comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Item 14 (run_git/atomic_write/_reap/_lazy_load shared helpers) merged to main via Gerrit 225-228.". Session: c66044058.

compiled_state.description:
# Consolidate cross-session infra clones into shared helpers

## What
- One `run_git(cwd, *args, …)` replacing ~12 divergent `_git()` wrappers (raise vs None vs str returns).
- One `atomic_write(path, data)` replacing ~25 inline temp+rename sites.
- One `_lazy_load(key, filename)` for the 31 hand-rolled reconciler path-loaders (preserve the sys.modules key contract).
- One `_reap_process_group(...)` shared by grounding + reconciler (currently byte-similar duplicates).
- Converge NEW canonical-JSON hashing sites onto `_store/canonical.py` — but NOT the pinned attestation basis (attest.py/pass1.py), whose byte format is deliberately frozen.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Shared helpers land at the bottom of the dep stack (no new import cycles); call sites migrated.
- [ ] The reconciler's stdlib-only isolation is preserved for its own copies where required.
- [ ] Full suite green; commit(s) carry `rebar-ticket:` trailers.
compiled_state.title: Consolidate cross-session infra clones into shared helpers
